parameters.content:
## Photo Intake Pipeline
When a new photo is dropped into the "CulinaryJEMs Photos" Google Drive folder, this workflow:
1. Downloads the image
2. Sends it to OpenClaw AI to generate a caption + hashtags
3. Adds a draft row to the Content Calendar Google Sheet
4. Sends a Discord notification to #content-queue

The sister just needs to drop photos into Drive — everything else is automatic!

## Watching for new photos
Checks the Google Drive 'CulinaryJEMs Photos' folder every 5 minutes for new images.

## AI generates caption
Sends the photo info to OpenClaw AI, which writes an Instagram caption with hashtags in the Culinary JEMs brand voice.

## Saves to Content Calendar
Adds a new 'draft' row to the Google Sheet so the sister can review and approve it.

## Notifies Discord
Sends a message to #content-queue so the sister knows there's a new draft to review.
